changelog: Fixed: Out-of-bounds visual bugs by disabling incompatible sorting transforms for mixed-span elements.
Added: Immediate grid reflow during item drag-overs using mathematically perfect CSS Grid layouts.
Fixed: Native touch scrolling is no longer hijacked when swiping across the dashboard.
Fixed: Silent crash in the Update UI that prevented the OTA download modal from appearing.
Added: Dynamic version highlight indicator for unread patch notes.
